response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified the performers as holoX. 2. Detected the song 'Joya Repaint' (常夜リペイント) by holoX starting at 00:08. 3. Used search tool to find the official lyrics for 'Joya Repaint'. 4. Segmented the video into three parts: introduction, musical performance, and outro/talk. 5. Compiled the JSON structure with the correct lyrics and metadata.
response.global_summary: A video showcasing a live performance of the song "Joya Repaint" (常夜リペイント) by the Hololive VTuber group holoX at the hololive 4th fes. concert, followed by an audience interaction and announcement segment.

scenes.description: The video opens with the performers greeting the audience. Text on screen indicates 'hololive 4th fes.'
The song 'Joya Repaint' (常夜リペイント) begins. The holoX members perform choreography on stage. The song's title is displayed on screen.
